text.tspan: Implementation Specification: Comparing DP-Only Communication Across Stages 1, 2, 3

ul.li: Ψ(P): Total Model Parameters (e.g., 175B for GPT-3)
N: Data Parallelism (DP) World Size (Number of GPUs)
Note: Optimizer state includes Master Weights (4B) + Momentum (4B) + Variance (4B)

g.text: • Stage 1 & 2: Communication volume is strictly equal or less than Vanilla DP.
• Stage 3: Primary bottleneck is All-Gather in the Forward pass (high latency sensitivity).
• Throughput: Stage 2 typically yields the highest throughput by avoiding gather overheads.
• Scalability: Stage 3 is the only method that scales to 1T+ parameter models on commodity clusters.
